name: TENET HEALTHCARE CORP
business: Tenet Healthcare Corporation is a diversified healthcare services company operating acute care and specialty hospitals, outpatient facilities, and providing revenue cycle management and value-based care services through Conifer Health Solutions. Its Hospital Operations segment includes 50 hospitals and 132 outpatient facilities, while its Ambulatory Care segment holds interests in 533 ambulatory surgery centers and 26 surgical hospitals. The company primarily serves patients covered by managed care payers, Medicare, Medicaid, and other insurers, as well as uninsured individuals.
sellsTo: Hospitals and health systems (for Conifer services)

exposures.sentence: Recent advancements in technology and applications in healthcare have allowed us to accelerate the adoption of artificial intelligence ( AI ) and Generative AI enabled tools in areas such as clinical care coordination, medical documentation, revenue cycle management and administrative services.
Our labor costs have been, and may continue to be, adversely affected by competition for staffing, the shortage of experienced nurses and other healthcare professionals, and labor union activity.
In April 2022, we experienced a cybersecurity incident that disrupted a subset of our hospital operations and involved the exfiltration of certain confidential company and patient information.

catalysts.event: Opening of Florida Coast Medical Center
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, we opened the newly constructed, 54-bed Florida Coast Medical Center in Port St. Lucie, Florida.

catalysts.event: Conifer Health Solutions agreement with CommonSpirit Health
catalysts.sentence: On January 27, 2026, we entered into an agreement with CommonSpirit Health (a successor to Catholic Health Initiatives) ( CHI ) relating to Conifer Health Solutions, LLC ( Conifer ).

catalysts.event: Lease expiration and ownership transfer of Desert Regional Medical Center
catalysts.sentence: Current lease expires on May 30, 2027. In December 2024, we entered into a new lease-purchase agreement with a term of May 31, 2027 through May 30, 2057; in accordance with the provisions of the agreement, we will take ownership of the hospital at the end of the term.
